title: scrophularia elatior
intro: Scrophularia elatior, also known as the tall figwort, is a perennial plant species in the figwort family, native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as colds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Scrophularia elatior include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. In herbal preparations, Scrophularia elatior is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as in combination with other herbs to create remedies for respiratory and immune-related issues.
